nasb.text: If there is a man who marries a woman and her mother, it is immorality; both he and they shall be burned with fire, so that there will be no immorality in your midst.

esv.text: If a man takes a woman and her mother also, it is depravity; he and they shall be burned with fire, that there may be no depravity among you.

cnv.text: 如果有人娶妻，又娶岳母，就是行了醜惡的事，要把他們三人用火燒死，好使你們中間不再有醜惡的事。

ccb.text: 如果有人娶妻，又娶岳母，便是大恶。要把他们三人烧死，使你们杜绝这种败坏之事。
